skill.name: maxhub-kuaishou
skill.description: 快手全场景数据查询助手。支持App和Web双端API，覆盖视频详情、用户数据、搜索、热榜、直播、评论等全功能。
skill.summary: Query and analyze Kuaishou platform data including videos, user profiles, trending topics, and search results through the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate API wrapper for querying Kuaishou data through the MaxHub service (www.aconfig.cn). All 135 static findings have been evaluated as false positives: hardcoded URLs point to the documented API endpoint, shell commands are documentation examples for curl-based API calls, and env access is for the declared MAXHUB_API_KEY credential. The skill transparently declares its requirements and usage patterns. No malicious intent, obfuscation, or prompt injection detected.

low_findings.title: API Credential Access in Environment Variables
low_findings.description: The skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY from environment variables for API authentication. This is a legitimate and declared requirement documented in SKILL.md metadata. Users must configure their own API key obtained from aconfig.cn. The key is used only as Bearer token for authorized API calls.

low_findings.title: External API Network Calls via curl
low_findings.description: The skill uses curl to make HTTP requests to the MaxHub API at www.aconfig.cn. These are documented, legitimate API calls for querying Kuaishou data. All API endpoints and parameters are defined in reference documentation files. The pattern is standard for API wrapper skills.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Documentation in Code Blocks
low_findings.description: Bash code blocks in SKILL.md and README files show curl commands and environment variable checks. These are documentation examples for user reference, not active code execution. The commands execute legitimate API calls for the skill's intended purpose.

dangerous_patterns.title: Combined Network, Command Execution, and Credential Access
dangerous_patterns.description: The static analyzer flagged the combination of network access, shell commands, and credential access as potentially dangerous. After evaluation, this combination is the standard and expected pattern for a legitimate API wrapper skill. All three risk factors are inherent to the skill's documented purpose of querying an external API with an authenticated key. The skill is fully transparent with declared dependencies, documented endpoints, and clear setup instructions.

content.user_title: Query and Analyze Kuaishou Platform Data with API Access
content.value_statement: Accessing Kuaishou platform data normally requires complex API integration and reverse engineering. This skill solves that by providing simple AI-powered access to the MaxHub API for querying video details, user profiles, search results, trending topics, and comments across both App and Web endpoints.
actual_capabilities: Query Kuaishou video details by ID or share URL
Retrieve user profile information and statistics
Search Kuaishou content with filters and pagination
Access trending and hot list data across categories
Fetch video comments and sub-comments with cursor pagination
Generate share links and short URLs for Kuaishou content
limitations: Requires a valid MaxHub API key configured in the environment
API availability depends on third-party service stability and rate limits
Cannot create, edit, or delete Kuaishou content, only query read-only data
Some endpoints may return cached data rather than real-time results

use_cases.title: Content Trend Analysis
use_cases.description: Analyze trending videos and hot lists on Kuaishou to identify content patterns, popular topics, and audience preferences over time.
use_cases.target_user: Content strategists and social media analysts

use_cases.title: User Audience Research
use_cases.description: Research Kuaishou user profiles including follower counts, engagement metrics, and video performance to understand audience demographics.

use_cases.title: Competitive Content Monitoring
use_cases.description: Search and compare Kuaishou content across categories and creators to track competitor activity and benchmark performance.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Video Details Lookup
prompt_templates.prompt: Find details about the Kuaishou video at https://v.kuaishou.com/cNYP0Z
prompt_templates.scenario: A user wants to look up metadata for a specific Kuaishou video using its share URL

prompt_templates.title: User Profile and Content Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for user 快手美食 on Kuaishou and show their profile information including follower count, total likes, and recent video list
prompt_templates.scenario: A user wants to research a Kuaishou creator to evaluate their audience reach and content style

prompt_templates.title: Trending Topics Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me today Kuaishou hot list and analyze the top 10 trending topics with their view counts and category distribution
prompt_templates.scenario: A content strategist wants to identify what topics are currently popular on the platform

prompt_templates.title: Comprehensive User Deep Dive
prompt_templates.prompt: Do a full analysis of Kuaishou user 3xz63mn6fngqtiq: get their profile info, list their recent videos, show top comments, and summarize their content themes and engagement patterns
prompt_templates.scenario: A brand manager needs a complete picture of a Kuaishou influencer before partnership decisions

output_examples.input: Find details about the Kuaishou video at https://v.kuaishou.com/cNYP0Z
output_examples.output:
Video Title: Weekend Cooking Challenge
Author: Chef Wang
Views: 2.3M
Likes: 185K
Comments: 4.2K
Shares: 891
Published: 2024-03-15
Duration: 3:42

output_examples.input: Show me the Kuaishou hot list today
output_examples.output:
Kuaishou Hot List Top 5:
1. Spring Festival Travel Rush - 52.3M views
2. New Smartphone Launch Review - 48.1M views
3. Street Food Compilation - 35.7M views
4. Fitness Challenge Day 30 - 28.9M views
5. Pet Funny Moments - 22.4M views

best_practices: Configure the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable before starting queries to ensure uninterrupted API access
Use specific keywords and available filters for targeted searches instead of broad queries
Provide clear context about what data you need so the skill routes to the correct API endpoint
anti_patterns: Do not share or display the MAXHUB_API_KEY value in any output to prevent credential exposure
Do not make excessive parallel requests to the same endpoint as this may trigger rate limiting
Do not assume returned data is real-time without checking; some endpoints return cached results

faq.question: How do I get a MaxHub API key?
faq.answer: Sign up at https://www.aconfig.cn, go to your dashboard, and create an API key in the API Keys section.

faq.question: What platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports both Kuaishou App and Web APIs through the MaxHub API service.

faq.question: Is the data returned by this skill accurate?
faq.answer: Data comes from third-party APIs for reference only. Some endpoints may return cached data. Always verify critical data.

faq.question: What languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports both Chinese and English. The response language matches your input language automatically.

faq.question: Can this skill post or modify content on Kuaishou?
faq.answer: No. This skill only queries and reads data. It cannot post, edit, or delete any Kuaishou content.

faq.question: What should I do if an API call fails?
faq.answer: First verify your API key is valid and configured. Then retry the request. Some endpoints have rate limits or temporary service issues.
